action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs took ~90min, macro_f1=0.0304 on test. Loss still declining. Analysis: Model needs much more training. 30min/epoch means I can do ~10 more epochs in remaining time. Decision: Train for 10 epochs with improved settings: (1) cosine LR schedule, (2) label smoothing, (3) keep weighted sampler, (4) slightly higher backbone LR. This should significantly improve the macro_f1.
